structure_sections.target_fill: What's this startup that's building hotels in the moon

visual_signature.shot_type_pattern: talking_head close-up → broll_visual proof → broll_visual proof screen → broll_visual claim support → broll_visual claim support → talking_head unknown reaction
visual_signature.text_overlay_pattern: Bold stroke (MrBeast) Center: sentence-case bold stroke captions with black outline
visual_signature.sfx_pattern: vocal hit on first cut-in, silent setup beats
visual_signature.motion_pattern: pan_left on reveal; zoom_in on proof b-roll; static holds on support beats

structure_sections.target_fill: This is GRU Space and they just got an OIC

visual_signature.text_overlay_pattern: Bold stroke (MrBeast) Center: sentence-case bold captions with black stroke
visual_signature.sfx_pattern: vocal hit on name drop, silent CTAs

visual_signature.text_overlay_pattern: Bold stroke (MrBeast) Center: bold stroke center align
visual_signature.sfx_pattern: vocal on initial claim, silent proof beats
visual_signature.motion_pattern: ken_burns on support screens, static holds on intro

structure_sections.target_fill: Would you invest in GRU Space

visual_signature.shot_type_pattern: broll_visual call to action – talking_head direct question
visual_signature.text_overlay_pattern: Bold stroke (MrBeast) Center: bold stroke center align with key-word highlight
visual_signature.sfx_pattern: impulse_noisy on CTA opener, silent question
visual_signature.motion_pattern: punch_in on query, none on response

structure_rationale: The target transcript clearly follows a strong hook-intro-body-cta format similar to the inspiration reels.
content_source_patterns: screen recording of the subject's website
close-up of a relevant prop or artifact
style_summary: - reel 1: 83.2s, 78 shots, cuts/sec=0.93, shot types: broll_visual 53%, talking_head_unknown 37%, broll_talking_head 9%, talking_head 2%; captions: Bold stroke (MrBeast); center, phrase/3 words, sentence_case, large, bordered black, static, Fredoka, emoji; text overlays 91% at mixed; overlays: 6% shots, 4.3/min; kinds image 67%, sticker 17%, pip_video 17%; motion static 83%, animated 17%; regions top_left 33%, top_center 17%, middle_center 17%; motion: 81% moving; pan_right 28%, pan_left 23%, ken_burns 21%, none 19%; SFX 148/min, 82% cut hits

overlay_pattern.summary: This creator predominantly uses static image overlays, with occasional pip_video elements. These tend to appear in the hook or middle of the reel, often in static form. The pip_video introduces a dynamic element during the middle section.

entries.script_context: Mainly during the hook and middle. Context involves introducing vital concepts.
Middle, when expanding on a project or feature.
Hook, to highlight or reinforce the introduction.

summaries: The video uses vocal sound effects frequently, almost on every word, with impulse_noisy effects marking key moments like reveals or punchlines.

hook_speeches: How do three high schoolers even compete against engineers from Google Meta and Microsoft in an AWS

font_descriptors: bold rounded sans-serif with black stroke

summaries: The video uses vocal sound effects frequently, almost on every word, with impulse_noisy effects marking key moments like reveals or punchlines.
